joke: Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
Why did the bicycle fall over? Because it was two-tired!
Why did the computer go to therapy? Because it had too many unresolved issues!
Why did the math book look so sad? Because it had too many problems!
Why did the coffee file a police report? Because it got mugged!
Why did the musician get locked out of his house? Because he lost his keys!
Why did the tomato turn red? Because it saw the salad dressing!
Why did the ghost go to the party? Because he heard it was going to be a real scream!
Why did the clock get kicked out of class? Because it kept ticking off the teacher!
Why did the ocean break up with the beach? Because it found someone deeper!
Why did the astronaut break up with his girlfriend? Because he needed space!
Why did the banker break up with his girlfriend? Because he lost interest!
Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
Why did the comedian keep telling jokes to a brick wall? Because he heard it was a tough crowd!
Why did the lamp get promoted? Because it was always brightening up the room!
Why did the dictionary go to the doctor? Because it was feeling a little wordy!
Why did the cat sit on the computer? Because it wanted to keep an eye on the mouse!
Why did the chair get promoted? Because it was always supporting everyone!
Why did the mountain break up with the hill? Because it found someone more uplifting!
Why did the mirror get promoted? Because it always reflected well on everyone!
Why did the pencil break up with the eraser? Because it felt like they were just rubbing each other the wrong way!
Why did the photographer get kicked out of the party? Because he kept shooting everyone!
Why did the gardener plant a light bulb? Because he wanted to grow a power plant!
Why did the historian break up with the calendar? Because he felt like their relationship was just a bunch of dates!
Why did the elevator break up with the stairs? Because it found someone who really lifted it up!
Why did the phone break up with the charger? Because it felt like they were just going through the motions!
Why did the cloud break up with the storm? Because it found someone who was a little more grounded!
Why did the lawyer break up with the judge? Because he found someone who was more appealing!
Why did the dentist break up with the tooth? Because it felt like they were just going through the motions!
Why did the actor break up with the director? Because he felt like they were just playing a part!
